scripts.check:version: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf-8'));const lock=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package-lock.json','utf-8'));const html=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf-8');const readme=fs.readFileSync('README.md','utf-8');const vts=fs.readFileSync('src/version.ts','utf-8');const appMatch=vts.match(/APP_VERSION\\s*=\\s*\"([^\"]+)\"/);const buildMatch=vts.match(/BUILD_VERSION\\s*=\\s*\"([^\"]+)\"/);const appV=appMatch?appMatch[1]:'';const buildV=buildMatch?buildMatch[1]:'';let ok=true;if(pkg.version!==buildV){console.error('FAIL: package.json='+pkg.version+' expected='+buildV);ok=false;}if(lock.version!==buildV||lock.packages[''].version!==buildV){console.error('FAIL: package-lock version mismatch');ok=false;}if(!html.includes(appV)){console.error('FAIL: index.html missing '+appV);ok=false;}if(!readme.includes(appV)){console.error('FAIL: README.md missing '+appV);ok=false;}if(ok){console.log('APP_VERSION='+appV);console.log('package='+buildV);console.log('lock='+buildV);console.log('html='+appV);console.log('README='+appV);console.log('Version OK');}else{process.exit(1);}"
scripts.check:prod-no-e2e: npx vite build --outDir dist_prod_check && node check-prod-e2e.cjs
